subject: Sprint 2 progress — ~15 min in
body:
Progress update:

✅ Completed:
- Ocean specular (Globe.ts) - roughness/metalness maps, shiny water, matte land
- Weather interpolation (WeatherManager.ts) - time stepping, prefetching, loading events
- Loading spinner (UI.ts) - animated indicator on data fetch
- Tile server (server/routes/tiles.ts) - generates weather tiles on-the-fly
  - Cloud, temp, humidity, wind, pressure tiles
  - PNG encoding with cache
  - 5-min cache TTL

🔄 Still working:
- GFS adapter improvements
- More UI polish

Build passes: TypeScript clean, Vite 521KB.

Your sprint 1 output was great. The visual stack is really coming together.
